THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAZAKOFF, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BETTA OF LOS ANGELES, INC.DBA CARRANO SHOES SWENGEL-CASARA, KIMBERLY CARRANO, ELIZABETH CARRANO, VALENTINA $2,341.50 PRINCIPAL, $174.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,515.50, DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT, SWENGEL- CASARA, KIMBERLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CORRESP LTR. BY RICHARD KAZAKOFF REC'D & FILED.
